from-amber-500 to-orange-600
Slide and merge tiles to reach 2048

2048 is the incredibly addictive sliding tile puzzle that became an internet sensation! Slide numbered tiles in any direction on a 4×4 grid. When two tiles with the same number collide, they merge into one with their sum. Starting from 2s and 4s, watch your tiles grow exponentially as you strategize to create the elusive 2048 tile. Simple to learn yet nearly impossible to master, this game will keep you coming back for just one more try!

Combine matching numbered tiles by sliding them together to create increasingly larger numbers. Your ultimate goal is to create a tile with the number 2048, but the game continues even after you achieve this milestone. How high can you go?
Use arrow keys or swipe to slide all tiles in one direction. When two tiles with the same number touch, they merge into one. Each move spawns a new tile (2 or 4). Try to reach the 2048 tile!
Use arrow keys (↑ ↓ ← →) on desktop or swipe in any direction on mobile to slide all tiles at once. All tiles move as far as possible in the chosen direction.
All tiles slide in the chosen direction until blocked
When two tiles with the same number collide, they merge into their sum
Each merge scores points equal to the new tile's value
A new tile (90% chance of 2, 10% chance of 4) appears after each move
Game ends when no more moves are possible
Undo Feature - Take back your last move
Score Tracking - Watch your points climb
High Score - Beat your personal best
Endless Mode - Continue past 2048
Keep your highest tile in a corner
Build numbers in a snake pattern toward your corner
Avoid moving tiles in the direction opposite your high-value corner
Plan several moves ahead to avoid filling up the board
Is it possible to always win 2048?
With optimal strategy, reaching 2048 is achievable. However, due to random tile placement, winning isn't guaranteed every game.
What happens after I get 2048?
Congratulations! You can continue playing to reach higher numbers like 4096, 8192, and beyond. The game only ends when no moves are possible.
What's the best strategy?
Keep your highest tile in a corner and build toward it. Many players prefer the bottom-left corner and avoid pressing Up.
Why do I keep losing?
Focus on keeping your largest tiles together and avoid creating scattered high numbers. Practice and patience are key!
滑动合并数字方块达到2048
2048是一款令人上瘾的滑块数字谜题游戏，曾风靡全网！在4×4的网格上向任意方向滑动数字方块。当两个相同数字的方块相撞时，它们会合并成一个，数值为两者之和。从2和4开始，看着你的方块指数级增长，目标是创造难以捉摸的2048方块。简单易学却几乎无法精通，这款游戏会让你一次又一次地挑战！
通过滑动合并相同数字的方块来创造越来越大的数字。你的终极目标是创造一个2048数字的方块，但即使达成这个里程碑游戏还会继续。你能走多远？
使用方向键或滑动屏幕将所有方块向一个方向移动。当两个相同数字的方块相碰时，它们会合并成一个。每次移动后会生成新方块（2或4）。尝试达到2048方块！
在电脑上使用方向键（↑ ↓ ← →）或在手机上向任意方向滑动来一次移动所有方块。所有方块会在选定方向上尽可能远地滑动。
所有方块在选定方向上滑动直到被阻挡
当两个相同数字的方块碰撞时，它们合并成它们的和
每次合并得分等于新方块的数值
每次移动后会出现新方块（90%概率是2，10%概率是4）
当无法移动时游戏结束
撤销功能 - 撤回上一步移动
分数追踪 - 看着分数攀升
最高分 - 打破你的个人记录
无尽模式 - 超过2048后继续游戏
把最大的数字保持在角落
按蛇形模式朝角落方向构建数字
避免朝高价值角落的相反方向移动方块
提前规划几步以避免填满棋盘
是否可能每次都赢2048？
使用最优策略，达到2048是可行的。但由于随机方块位置，并非每局都能保证获胜。
达到2048后会发生什么？
恭喜！你可以继续游戏达到更高的数字如4096、8192等。只有当无法移动时游戏才会结束。
最佳策略是什么？
把最高数字保持在角落并向它构建。许多玩家偏好左下角，并避免按上键。
为什么我总是输？
专注于保持大数字在一起，避免创建分散的大数字。练习和耐心是关键！

Among Us
Control your crewmate character

Experience the fun of Among Us in this arcade tribute! Control your character as it moves through the spaceship, using the kill button to eliminate targets and sabotage to create chaos. While simplified from the full social deduction game, this captures the spirit and characters that made Among Us a global phenomenon. Move smoothly, time your actions, and enjoy the iconic crewmate animations!

Navigate your character around the map, eliminate targets when they're nearby, and trigger sabotage effects. In exploration mode, simply enjoy moving your character around and watching the animations.

Use Arrow Keys or WASD to move your character around. Click the Kill button to eliminate nearby targets. Click the Sabotage button to trigger chaos effects. In Character Move mode, simply explore and enjoy the animations!
Arrow Keys or WASD move your character in all directions. Click on-screen buttons for Kill and Sabotage actions. Movement is smooth and responsive.

Is this the full Among Us game?
No, this is a simplified arcade tribute featuring the iconic character and some signature moves. It captures the spirit of Among Us in a casual arcade format.
How do I eliminate targets?
Move close to a target character and click the Kill button when it becomes active. The kill animation will play.
What does sabotage do?
Sabotage triggers visual effects that simulate the chaos from the real game—flashing lights, alarms, and other distractions.
Can I play with others?
This is a single-player experience focused on character control and actions. For the full social deduction experience, try the official Among Us game.

控制你的船员角色

可以和其他人一起玩吗？
这是专注于角色控制和动作的单人体验。要获得完整的社交推理体验，请尝试官方太空狼人杀游戏。

Anagrams
Unscramble jumbled letters to form meaningful words! A fantastic brain exercise that tests your vocabulary and word recognition abilities under time pressure.

Anagrams is the classic word puzzle that challenges your vocabulary and pattern recognition! Given a set of scrambled letters, you must rearrange them to form valid words. Each puzzle tests your ability to see letter combinations and recognize word structures. With time pressure adding excitement, this brain exercise improves spelling, vocabulary, and mental flexibility!

Rearrange the jumbled letters to form the correct word before time runs out. Use your vocabulary knowledge and pattern recognition to identify the hidden word. Build streaks of correct answers for bonus points!
Look at the shuffled letters and type the correct word. Use the hint if stuck. You have 3 attempts per word. Longer streaks earn bonus points!
Type your answer using the keyboard and press Enter to submit. All letters must be used exactly once. Click the hint button if you need help, though hints may reduce your score.
All letters must be used
Each letter used exactly once
Time limit per puzzle
Hints available at score cost
Streak bonuses for consecutive solves
Time Challenge - Race the clock
Hint System - Get help when stuck
Streak Bonuses - Consecutive wins
Vocabulary Building - Learn new words
Look for common prefixes and suffixes
Try arranging letters in different orders
Common letter combinations like TH, CH, ING
Say the letters out loud to hear possibilities
What's the best way to solve anagrams?

Look for common letter patterns first (TH, CH, QU, ING). Identify vowels and try consonant combinations around them. Saying letters aloud often triggers word recognition. With practice, you'll develop intuition for letter arrangements.
Are some letter combinations impossible?
Every puzzle has a valid solution! However, some words are more obscure than others. If stuck, use a hint rather than wasting time on impossible arrangements.
How can I improve at anagrams?
Build your vocabulary through reading, practice regularly, and learn to recognize common letter patterns. The more words you know, the faster you'll spot them in scrambled form.
Does playing anagrams help vocabulary?
Absolutely! You'll encounter new words and reinforce known ones. The active process of rearranging letters creates stronger memory connections than passive reading.
字谜重组
将打乱的字母重新组合成有意义的单词！绝佳的大脑训练，在时间压力下测试您的词汇量和单词识别能力。
字谜重组是挑战你的词汇量和模式识别的经典文字谜题！给定一组打乱的字母，你必须重新排列它们形成有效的单词。每个谜题测试你看到字母组合和识别单词结构的能力。时间压力增加了刺激，这款大脑锻炼改善拼写、词汇和心理灵活性！
在时间用尽之前重新排列打乱的字母形成正确的单词。使用你的词汇知识和模式识别来识别隐藏的单词。建立正确答案的连续来获得奖励分数！
看打乱的字母并输入正确的单词。如果卡住可以使用提示。每个单词有3次尝试机会。连续答对可获得额外积分！
使用键盘输入你的答案，然后按Enter提交。必须使用所有字母，每个字母只用一次。如果需要帮助点击提示按钮，但提示可能会减少你的分数。

时间挑战 - 与时钟赛跑
提示系统 - 卡住时获得帮助
连续奖励 - 连续获胜
词汇构建 - 学习新单词
寻找常见的前缀和后缀

解决变位词的最佳方法是什么？
首先寻找常见的字母模式（TH, CH, QU, ING）。识别元音并尝试围绕它们的辅音组合。大声说出字母通常会触发单词识别。通过练习，你会培养对字母排列的直觉。
有些字母组合是不可能的吗？
每个谜题都有有效的解决方案！然而，有些单词比其他单词更晦涩。如果卡住了，使用提示而不是浪费时间在不可能的排列上。
如何在变位词中进步？
通过阅读建立你的词汇量，定期练习，并学会识别常见的字母模式。你认识的单词越多，你就越快能在打乱的形式中发现它们。
玩变位词对词汇有帮助吗？
绝对有！你会遇到新单词并加强已知的单词。重新排列字母的主动过程比被动阅读创造更强的记忆连接。

Aim Trainer
Improve your mouse precision and speed

Aim Trainer is the ultimate tool for improving your mouse accuracy and reaction time! Whether you're a competitive FPS gamer looking to sharpen your skills or anyone wanting better mouse control, this trainer offers multiple exercises to boost your precision. Track your accuracy, reaction speed, and overall score as you click targets that appear across the screen. Practice daily and watch your skills improve!
Click on targets as quickly and accurately as possible. Achieve the highest score by maintaining high accuracy while minimizing reaction time. Track your improvement across multiple sessions.
Click on targets as they appear on screen. Different modes offer varied challenges: Classic (hit before timeout), Tracking (follow moving target), Flick (rapid target acquisition).
Move your mouse to aim and click to hit targets. Each target appears at a random location - click it as fast as possible before time runs out.
Targets appear randomly across the play area
Each target has a limited lifespan before disappearing
Accuracy = successful hits ÷ total clicks
Reaction time measured in milliseconds
Score based on speed, accuracy, and consistency
Classic Mode - Hit static targets before they disappear
Tracking Mode - Follow moving targets
Flick Mode - Rapid target acquisition practice
Statistics - Track accuracy, speed, and improvement
Keep your wrist relaxed for smoother movements
Focus on accuracy over speed initially
Use a consistent mouse sensitivity
Practice daily for noticeable improvement
What's a good accuracy score?
90%+ accuracy is good for beginners. Expert aimers maintain 95%+ accuracy. Focus on consistency before pushing for speed.
How often should I practice?
15-30 minutes daily is ideal. Consistent practice builds muscle memory more effectively than occasional long sessions.
Which mode is best for FPS gaming?
Flick mode helps with quick target acquisition, while Tracking improves following moving targets. Practice both for well-rounded skills.
Why use a consistent mouse sensitivity?
Your brain learns the muscle memory for specific movements. Changing sensitivity requires relearning aim, slowing your improvement.
瞄准训练
提升鼠标精准度和速度
瞄准训练是提升鼠标准确度和反应时间的终极工具！无论你是想要磨练技能的竞技FPS玩家还是想要更好鼠标控制的任何人，这个训练器提供多种练习来提升你的精准度。在点击屏幕上出现的目标时追踪你的准确率、反应速度和总体得分。每天练习，看着你的技能提升！
尽可能快速准确地点击目标。在保持高准确率的同时最小化反应时间来获得最高分。追踪你在多次练习中的进步。
点击屏幕上出现的目标。不同模式提供不同挑战：经典（超时前点击）、追踪（跟随移动目标）、甩枪（快速目标获取）。
移动鼠标瞄准，点击击中目标。每个目标出现在随机位置——在时间耗尽前尽快点击它。

准确率 = 成功命中 ÷ 总点击
反应时间以毫秒测量
得分基于速度、准确率和一致性
经典模式 - 在静态目标消失前击中它们
追踪模式 - 跟随移动的目标
甩枪模式 - 快速目标获取练习
统计数据 - 追踪准确率、速度和进步
保持手腕放松以获得更流畅的移动
最初专注于准确率而非速度
使用一致的鼠标灵敏度
每天练习以获得明显进步
什么是好的准确率分数？
90%+准确率对初学者来说不错。专家级瞄准手保持95%+准确率。在追求速度前先专注于一致性。
应该多久练习一次？
每天15-30分钟是理想的。持续练习比偶尔长时间练习更有效地建立肌肉记忆。
哪种模式对FPS游戏最好？
甩枪模式帮助快速目标获取，而追踪提升跟随移动目标。两种都练习以获得全面技能。
为什么要使用一致的鼠标灵敏度？
你的大脑学习特定移动的肌肉记忆。改变灵敏度需要重新学习瞄准，会减慢你的进步。

2048 Cupcakes
Combine matching cupcakes to create new flavors

2048 Cupcakes is a delicious twist on the viral puzzle sensation! Instead of numbers, you're combining adorable cupcakes to create increasingly elaborate treats. When two matching cupcakes collide, they merge into a more delicious version! Start with simple vanilla and chocolate, work your way up to exotic flavors, and try to reach the legendary Rainbow cupcake. Same addictive gameplay, sweeter presentation!

Slide cupcakes to merge matching pairs and create new, more elaborate cupcake varieties. Reach the Rainbow cupcake (2048) to win! Keep the board from filling up and maximize your score through strategic merges.
Use Arrow Keys or the buttons to slide all cupcakes in one direction. When two cupcakes of the same type collide, they merge into a better cupcake. Reach the Rainbow (2048) to win!
Use arrow keys (or swipe on mobile) to slide all cupcakes in that direction. All cupcakes move as far as possible until they hit a wall or another cupcake.

What's the highest cupcake?
The Rainbow cupcake (2048) is the classic goal, but dedicated players can continue to 4096 and beyond! Each tier has a unique cupcake design.
Is this harder than regular 2048?
The mechanics are identical—the difficulty comes from the same strategic challenge. Some players find cupcakes more engaging than numbers!
The corner strategy works best: pick a corner, keep your highest cupcake there, and build in a snake pattern. Never let high-value cupcakes get trapped in the middle.
Can I undo moves?
Yes! Use the undo button to fix mistakes. This is helpful when learning, but purists prefer playing without it for the true challenge.
2048纸杯蛋糕
组合匹配的纸杯蛋糕创造新口味
2048纸杯蛋糕是病毒式益智游戏的甜蜜改编！不是数字，而是组合可爱的纸杯蛋糕创造越来越精致的甜点。当两个匹配的纸杯蛋糕碰撞时，它们会合并成更美味的版本！从简单的香草和巧克力开始，逐步升级到异国风味，尝试达到传说中的彩虹纸杯蛋糕。同样令人上瘾的游戏玩法，更甜美的呈现！
滑动纸杯蛋糕合并匹配对，创造更新颖精致的纸杯蛋糕品种。达到彩虹纸杯蛋糕(2048)获胜！保持棋盘不被填满，通过战略性合并最大化你的分数。
使用方向键或按钮将所有纸杯蛋糕向一个方向滑动。当两个相同类型的纸杯蛋糕碰撞时，它们会合并成更好的纸杯蛋糕。达到彩虹(2048)获胜！
使用方向键（或在手机上滑动）向该方向滑动所有纸杯蛋糕。所有纸杯蛋糕尽可能移动直到撞墙或另一个纸杯蛋糕。
匹配的纸杯蛋糕碰撞时合并
每次合并创建更高层次的纸杯蛋糕

Asteroids
Navigate through an asteroid field! Rotate and thrust to avoid collisions while shooting asteroids into smaller pieces. Vector graphics gaming at its finest!

Asteroids is the iconic 1979 Atari arcade game that defined space shooters! Pilot a triangular spaceship through an endless asteroid field, shooting space rocks into smaller and smaller pieces until they're destroyed. The vector graphics create a clean, minimalist aesthetic while the physics-based movement with momentum and inertia delivers uniquely satisfying gameplay. UFOs occasionally appear to add extra challenge to this timeless classic!

Destroy all asteroids in each wave by shooting them with your ship's laser. Large asteroids split into medium ones, medium into small, and small ones are destroyed completely. Survive as long as possible while racking up points and avoiding collisions with any asteroid or enemy fire!
Use arrow keys: Left/Right to rotate, Up to thrust, Space to shoot. Large asteroids split into smaller ones. Don't get hit by any asteroid!
Left/Right arrows rotate your ship. Up arrow thrusts forward (ship has momentum!). Space fires your laser. The ship wraps around screen edges—flying off one side brings you back on the opposite side.

Bonus UFOs - Extra points and challenge

Clear small asteroids first - they're harder to hit
Use momentum to drift and shoot

Why does my ship keep moving after I stop thrusting?

Asteroids features realistic physics with momentum and inertia. Your ship continues drifting in its current direction until you thrust in another direction. Mastering this drift is key to high-level play!
What's the scoring system?
Large asteroids are worth 20 points, medium asteroids 50 points, and small asteroids 100 points. Small asteroids are harder to hit but reward more points. UFOs are worth bonus points.
How do I deal with lots of small asteroids?

Small asteroids move faster and are harder to hit. Stay calm, keep your distance, and pick them off one at a time. Using your momentum to create space while shooting backward is an effective strategy.
What happens when I clear all asteroids?
A new wave begins with more asteroids than before. The difficulty increases with each wave, eventually reaching a maximum number of asteroids per wave.

用飞船的激光射击摧毁每一波中的所有小行星。大型小行星分裂成中型的，中型的分裂成小型的，小型的被完全摧毁。在获得积分的同时尽可能长时间生存，避免与任何小行星或敌人火力碰撞！

15 Puzzle
The classic sliding tile puzzle! Arrange numbered tiles from 1 to 15 in order by sliding them into the empty space. Test your spatial reasoning skills.

The 15 Puzzle is the iconic sliding tile puzzle that has challenged minds since the 1880s! Fifteen numbered tiles sit in a 4×4 grid with one empty space. Slide tiles into the gap one at a time, working to arrange them in numerical order from 1 to 15. Simple rules but deep strategy—this timeless brain teaser exercises spatial reasoning, planning, and problem-solving skills!

Arrange all 15 numbered tiles in sequential order from 1 to 15, with the empty space in the bottom-right corner. Slide tiles strategically into the gap, planning several moves ahead to achieve the correct arrangement.
Click a tile adjacent to the empty space to slide it. Arrange all tiles in numerical order from 1-15, with the empty space in the bottom right.
Click or tap any tile adjacent to the empty space to slide that tile into the gap. Only tiles directly next to the empty space can move. Continue sliding until all numbers are in order.

Only adjacent tiles can slide
Goal: Numbers 1-15 in order

Moves tracked for scoring
Classic Design - Timeless puzzle

Shuffle Difficulty - Easy to hard
Solve the top row first, then work down
Don't worry about the last two numbers in a row until the end
Learn the "rotation" technique for moving tiles
Practice the final 2x3 section repeatedly
Is every 15 Puzzle solvable?
No! Half of all random arrangements are unsolvable. The puzzle is solvable only if the number of inversions (pairs out of order) is even. All puzzles in games are pre-shuffled to be solvable.
What's the best solving strategy?
Work row by row from top to bottom. First solve the top row (1-2-3-4), then the second row (5-6-7-8), then solve the remaining 2×3 section using rotation techniques.
How many moves does it take to solve?
Any solvable position can be solved in 80 moves or fewer. Optimal solutions (fewest possible moves) are much harder to find than just solving the puzzle. Most people take 100+ moves.
Why is the 15 Puzzle famous?
Created in 1874, it became a worldwide craze in 1880. Sam Loyd famously offered a $1,000 prize for solving an unsolvable variant! It's considered one of the greatest puzzles of all time.
数字推盘
经典滑块谜题！通过滑动将数字方块从1到15按顺序排列。测试你的空间推理能力。
数字推盘是自1880年代以来挑战心智的标志性滑块谜题！十五个编号的方块放在4×4网格中，有一个空位。一次将方块滑入间隙，努力按数字顺序从1到15排列它们。规则简单但策略深刻——这款永恒的脑筋急转弯锻炼空间推理、规划和解决问题的技能！
将所有15个编号方块按从1到15的顺序排列，空位在右下角。策略性地将方块滑入间隙，提前计划几步来实现正确的排列。
点击与空格相邻的方块将其滑动到空格。将数字按从左到右、从上到下的顺序排列（1-15）。最后一个格子应该是空的。
点击或轻触与空位相邻的任何方块将该方块滑入间隙。只有直接在空位旁边的方块才能移动。继续滑动直到所有数字按顺序排列。

经典设计 - 永恒谜题
移动计数器 - 追踪效率

先解决第一行，然后第二行
将方块移动到目标位置附近
耐心规划——不要随意滑动
使用标准算法解决最后两层
每个数字推盘都可以解决吗？
不是！一半的随机排列是无法解决的。只有当逆序数（乱序对）是偶数时，谜题才是可解的。游戏中的所有谜题都预先洗牌确保可解。
最佳解决策略是什么？
从上到下逐行工作。首先解决第一行（1-2-3-4），然后第二行（5-6-7-8），然后使用旋转技巧解决剩余的2×3部分。
需要多少步才能解决？
任何可解的位置都可以在80步或更少步内解决。最优解（可能的最少步数）比仅仅解决谜题更难找到。大多数人需要100+步。
为什么数字推盘如此著名？
创建于1874年，它在1880年成为世界性狂热。Sam Loyd著名地为解决一个不可解的变体提供1,000美元奖金！它被认为是有史以来最伟大的谜题之一。

Battleship
Naval combat strategy game

Battleship is the classic naval combat strategy game that has been a favorite since its pencil-and-paper origins in the 1930s! Command a fleet of warships and engage in tactical warfare against an opponent. Place your ships strategically on your grid, then take turns firing salvos at enemy coordinates. Use logic and deduction to locate and destroy the enemy fleet before they sink yours! The tension builds with each shot—will you hit or miss?

Sink all five enemy ships before your own fleet is destroyed. Place your ships strategically to maximize survivability, then use logical deduction based on hit patterns to efficiently hunt down the enemy fleet.
First place your ships on your board (click to place, button to rotate). Then click enemy board to fire. Red = hit, Blue = miss. Sink all enemy ships to win!

What's the best strategy for placing ships?
Avoid predictable patterns like edges or corners. Space ships apart with at least one empty cell between them. Some players prefer placing ships near each other to confuse opponents.
How do I efficiently find ships?
Use a checkerboard pattern for initial shots—since no ship is smaller than 2 cells, this ensures you'll find something. Then focus on each hit.
What should I do after getting a hit?
Fire adjacent to the hit to determine the ship's direction. Once you know the orientation, continue in that line until the ship is sunk.
Why space ships apart?
If ships are adjacent, a lucky shot in the middle could reveal multiple ships. Spacing them forces your opponent to find each one separately.

Boggle
Find words in a 4x4 letter grid

Boggle is the classic word search game that has challenged vocabulary skills since 1972! Shake up the letter cubes and race against time to find as many words as possible hidden in a 4×4 grid of letters. Connect adjacent letters (including diagonals) to form words of 3 or more letters. Longer words score more points, so scan strategically and think fast!

Find as many valid words as possible within the time limit by connecting adjacent letters. Longer words earn more points. Beat your high score by expanding your vocabulary and improving your pattern recognition.
Click adjacent letters (horizontal, vertical, diagonal) to form words of 3+ letters. Each letter can only be used once per word. Longer words score more points.

Can I use the same letter twice in one word?
No, each letter cube can only be used once per word. However, if the same letter appears in different positions on the board, you can use each occurrence.
What's the best strategy for finding words?
Scan the board systematically, starting from each letter. Look for common prefixes (UN-, RE-, PRE-) and suffixes (-ING, -TION, -LY).
Are proper nouns allowed?
Standard Boggle rules exclude proper nouns, abbreviations, and foreign words. Stick to common English words found in standard dictionaries.
How do I find longer words?
Look for letter combinations that commonly appear together, like -TION, -UGHT, -OUGH. Practice recognizing patterns and word families.

Breakout
Atari's 1976 brick-breaking classic! Use your paddle to bounce the ball and destroy all bricks. Each brick type has different point values. Pure arcade bliss!

Breakout is the iconic 1976 Atari arcade game that defined an entire genre! Control a paddle at the bottom of the screen, bouncing a ball upward to shatter rows of colorful bricks. Each brick destroyed earns points, and clearing all bricks advances you to increasingly challenging levels. With simple one-paddle control but progressively difficult patterns, this classic offers pure arcade satisfaction!

Destroy all bricks on each level by bouncing the ball off your paddle. Keep the ball in play—missing it costs you lives. Clear all bricks to advance through levels and achieve the highest score possible!
Use arrow keys to move the paddle. Bounce the ball to break bricks. Clear all bricks to win. You have 3 lives - lose one when ball falls below paddle.
Use Left/Right arrow keys or mouse to move the paddle horizontally. The ball bounces automatically. Press Space or click to launch the ball at the start of each life.

Missing the ball loses a life

Classic Arcade - Authentic gameplay

Score System - Track your best
Simple Controls - Easy to learn
Angle your shots to hit more bricks
Aim for the top to cascade through rows

Speed increases as you progress
How does the ball angle work?
Where the ball hits your paddle affects its bounce angle. Hitting the center sends it straight up, while edges create sharper angles. Use this to aim at specific brick areas.
What's the best strategy for high scores?
Focus on creating paths through the brick field. Getting the ball above the bricks lets it bounce between bricks and the top, clearing many bricks automatically. Don't just clear row by row!
How many lives do I have?
You typically start with 3 lives. Each time the ball falls below your paddle without being caught, you lose a life. The game ends when all lives are lost.
What made Breakout historically significant?
Created by Atari in 1976 with involvement from Steve Wozniak and Steve Jobs, Breakout pioneered the block-breaking genre. It influenced countless games including Arkanoid and modern mobile hits.
打砖块
雅达利1976年打砖块经典！使用挡板弹跳球并消灭所有砖块。每种砖块有不同分值。纯粹的街机乐趣！
打砖块是1976年Atari定义整个类型的标志性街机游戏！控制屏幕底部的挡板，向上弹跳球来粉碎彩色砖块行。每摧毁一块砖都会得分，清除所有砖块让你进入越来越具挑战性的关卡。简单的单挡板控制但逐渐困难的模式，这款经典提供纯粹的街机满足感！
通过从挡板上弹跳球来摧毁每一关的所有砖块。保持球在游戏中——漏接球会失去生命。清除所有砖块进入关卡并获得尽可能高的分数！
使用左右方向键或鼠标移动挡板。让球保持反弹并击碎砖块。不要让球掉落！某些砖块需要多次击打或会掉落道具。

球的角度是如何工作的？
球击中挡板的位置影响其弹跳角度。击中中心会直接向上发送，而边缘创造更尖锐的角度。利用这个来瞄准特定的砖块区域。
获得高分的最佳策略是什么？
专注于在砖块区域创造路径。让球到达砖块上方可以让它在砖块和顶部之间反弹，自动清除许多砖块。不要只是逐行清除！
我有多少条生命？
你通常从3条生命开始。每次球从挡板下方掉落而未被接住，你失去一条生命。当所有生命都用完时游戏结束。
打砖块在历史上有什么重要意义？
由Atari于1976年创建，Steve Wozniak和Steve Jobs参与其中，打砖块开创了打砖块类型。它影响了无数游戏，包括Arkanoid和现代手机热门游戏。

Brick Breaker
Bounce the ball to destroy bricks! Move your paddle to keep the ball in play. Clear all bricks to advance. A satisfying arcade classic!

Brick Breaker is the timeless arcade game that has captivated players for decades! Control a paddle at the bottom of the screen, bouncing a ball upward to shatter rows of colorful bricks. Each brick you destroy earns points, and clearing all bricks advances you to the next level. With power-ups that expand your paddle, multiply your balls, or grant special abilities, this simple concept delivers endless addictive gameplay!

Destroy all bricks on each level by bouncing the ball off your paddle. Keep the ball in play by intercepting it with your paddle—missing the ball costs you a life. Clear all bricks to advance through increasingly challenging levels and achieve the highest score possible!

What do different colored bricks mean?
Colors often indicate brick strength. Some bricks break in one hit, while others may require multiple hits. Special unbreakable bricks cannot be destroyed and must be worked around.
What power-ups can I get?
Common power-ups include paddle expansion, multi-ball, slow ball, lasers, and extra lives. Catch them with your paddle to activate—some appear randomly, others from destroyed bricks.
Where the ball hits your paddle affects its bounce angle. The center sends it straight up, while edges create sharper angles. Use this to aim at specific brick areas.
What's the best strategy for hard levels?
Focus on creating paths through the brick field rather than clearing row by row. Getting the ball above the bricks lets it bounce between bricks and the top, clearing many bricks automatically.

Bullpen
Divide the grid into rectangular pens

Bullpen (also known as Shikaku) is a satisfying logic puzzle where you partition the grid into rectangles! Each numbered cell must be contained in a rectangle exactly that size. Rectangles cannot overlap and must cover the entire grid. It's a perfect blend of spatial reasoning and arithmetic—deduce the shape and position of each pen from the number clues!

Divide the entire grid into rectangular regions so that each numbered cell is contained in a rectangle of exactly that area. Every cell must belong to exactly one rectangle, and rectangles cannot overlap.
Click and drag to create rectangles on the grid. Each number indicates the area of its rectangle. Rectangles cannot overlap and must cover the entire grid. Each rectangle contains exactly one number.

How do I know what shape a rectangle should be?
A number N can form rectangles of any dimensions that multiply to N. For example, 6 can be 1×6, 2×3, 3×2, or 6×1. Use surrounding constraints to determine which shape fits.
What if a number is prime?
Prime numbers (like 7 or 11) can only form 1×N rectangles. This makes them excellent starting points since their shape is forced.
Can I leave empty cells?
No. The puzzle is solved only when every cell is covered by exactly one rectangle. No overlaps, no gaps.
Start with numbers that have forced shapes (primes) or forced positions (corner numbers, numbers near edges). Then use the constraint that rectangles can't overlap to narrow down remaining options.

将网格划分为矩形围栏
牛栏逻辑（又称数方）是一个令人满足的逻辑谜题，你将网格分割成矩形！每个带数字的格子必须包含在恰好该大小的矩形中。矩形不能重叠且必须覆盖整个网格。这是空间推理和算术的完美结合——从数字线索推断每个围栏的形状和位置！

如何知道矩形应该是什么形状？
数字N可以形成任何乘积为N的尺寸矩形。例如，6可以是1×6、2×3、3×2或6×1。使用周围约束确定哪种形状适合。
如果数字是质数怎么办？
质数（如7或11）只能形成1×N的矩形。这使它们成为绝佳的起点，因为它们的形状是强制的。
可以留下空格吗？
不可以。谜题只有当每个格子都被恰好一个矩形覆盖时才解决。没有重叠，没有间隙。
从形状强制的数字（质数）或位置强制的数字（角落数字、靠近边缘的数字）开始。然后使用矩形不能重叠的约束来缩小剩余选项。

Calcudoku
A math-based logic puzzle! Fill the grid with numbers that satisfy cage equations. Each row and column must contain unique numbers. Brain training at its finest!

Calcudoku (also known as KenKen) is the arithmetic puzzle that combines math with logic! Fill a grid with numbers so each row and column contains unique digits. But there's a twist—grouped cells (cages) must produce a target number using a specified operation. Addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division puzzles exercise both your math skills and logical thinking!

Fill the grid with numbers 1-N (where N is the grid size) such that no number repeats in any row or column. Each cage must produce its target number when the operation is applied to its cells. Pure logic with a mathematical twist!

Click empty cells and use the number pad or keyboard (1-4) to enter numbers. Each cage shows a target result and operation. Numbers in each cage must produce that result when combined with the operation.

Click on an empty cell, then type a number or click the number pad. Each row and column must contain each number exactly once. Cages with operations must equal their target when the operation is applied.

Larger grids = more complexity
Math + Logic - Dual brain training

Look for cages with only one cell - that's the answer!
Use row/column constraints to eliminate possibilities
Start with cages that have forced solutions
Division and subtraction cages have limited options
How do cages with multiple cells work?

For addition and multiplication, combine all numbers in the cage. For subtraction, subtract the smaller numbers from the largest. For division, divide the largest by the smallest (may need multiple operations).
What about single-cell cages?
Single-cell cages have no operation—they simply show the number that goes in that cell. These are free hints that help you start solving!
Does order matter in cages?
For addition and multiplication, no—order doesn't matter. For subtraction and division, you always subtract smaller from larger or divide larger by smaller to get the target.
Is Calcudoku the same as KenKen?

Yes! Calcudoku and KenKen are essentially the same puzzle type. KenKen is a trademarked name, while Calcudoku is the generic term. Both follow the same rules and provide the same brain-training benefits.
算数独
基于数学的逻辑谜题！用满足格子算式的数字填满网格。每行每列必须包含唯一数字。极佳的大脑训练！
算数独（也称为KenKen）是将数学与逻辑结合的算术谜题！用数字填充网格，使每行每列包含唯一的数字。但有一个转折——分组的单元格（笼）必须使用指定的运算产生目标数字。加法、减法、乘法和除法谜题锻炼你的数学技能和逻辑思维！
用1-N的数字填充网格（N是网格大小），使任何行或列中没有数字重复。当运算应用于其单元格时，每个笼必须产生其目标数字。纯逻辑带有数学转折！
点击空格并使用数字键盘或键盘(1-4)输入数字。每个格子显示目标结果和运算符。格子内的数字必须用该运算符产生该结果。
点击空单元格，然后输入数字或点击数字键盘。每行每列必须恰好包含每个数字一次。带运算的笼在应用运算时必须等于其目标。

将运算应用于笼单元格 = 目标

数学+逻辑 - 双重大脑训练

多单元格笼是如何工作的？
对于加法和乘法，组合笼中的所有数字。对于减法，从最大的减去较小的数字。对于除法，用最大的除以最小的（可能需要多次运算）。
单单元格笼呢？
单单元格笼没有运算——它们只显示放入该单元格的数字。这些是帮助你开始解决的免费提示！
笼中的顺序重要吗？
对于加法和乘法，不——顺序不重要。对于减法和除法，你总是从较大的减去较小的或将较大的除以较小的来得到目标。
算数独和KenKen一样吗？
是的！算数独和KenKen本质上是相同的谜题类型。KenKen是注册商标名称，而算数独是通用术语。两者遵循相同的规则并提供相同的大脑训练好处。

Clear all bubbles before they reach the bottom line, and use clever bank shots off walls to hit tricky angles. Simple mechanics, endless satisfaction!

Clear all bubbles from the screen by matching three or more of the same color. Aim and shoot your bubble launcher to create matching groups. Prevent bubbles from reaching the bottom danger line or the game ends!

What happens when bubbles disconnect from the top?
Any bubbles that lose their connection to the top of the screen fall down and give you bonus points! This is a key strategy—cutting the connection of large clusters to clear them all at once.
How do wall bounces work?
Your bubbles can bounce off the side walls, changing their angle. Use this to reach bubbles that can't be hit with a straight shot. The trajectory preview helps you aim bank shots.
Do new bubbles keep appearing?
In many versions, a new row of bubbles pushes down from the top periodically or after a certain number of shots. This adds pressure to clear bubbles quickly before they reach the danger line.

Focus on creating large disconnections to drop massive clusters. Look for bubbles that are holding up many others below them—popping these can create huge cascades of falling bubbles for big bonus points.

Centipede
Destroy the centipede segment by segment

Centipede is the classic 1981 Atari arcade shooter that captivated a generation! A segmented centipede winds its way down through a field of mushrooms toward your ship at the bottom. Shoot each segment to break it apart, but beware—the pieces become independent threats! Along with fleas, spiders, and scorpions, this fast-paced action game requires quick reflexes and strategic shooting!

Destroy the centipede and all its segments before they reach the bottom of the screen. Clear each wave to advance to increasingly challenging levels. Avoid enemy creatures while shooting strategically through the mushroom field!
Use Arrow Keys to move your ship left and right. Press Spacebar to shoot upward. Destroy centipede segments before they reach you. Shoot mushrooms to clear paths!

What happens when I shoot a centipede segment?
The segment becomes a mushroom, and the centipede splits. Each piece continues independently, creating multiple threats to track!
Why do fleas appear?
Fleas drop from the top when there are too few mushrooms in the player area. They create new mushrooms as they fall, restoring the field.
What do scorpions do?
Scorpions crawl across the middle of the screen, poisoning mushrooms they touch. A poisoned mushroom sends the centipede into a frenzied dive toward the player!
Is there a pattern to the centipede's movement?
The centipede follows a predictable path until it hits a mushroom, then drops down and reverses direction. Learning this pattern is key to positioning your shots.

Chess
The ultimate game of strategy and tactics

Chess is the world's most celebrated strategy game, with a rich history spanning over 1,500 years! Command an army of 16 pieces—pawns, knights, bishops, rooks, queen, and king—on a 64-square battlefield. Each piece moves according to unique rules, creating infinite possibilities for tactical combinations and strategic depth. Whether you're a beginner learning the basics or a master refining your endgame technique, Chess offers endless intellectual challenge and satisfaction.

Checkmate your opponent's king by placing it under attack with no legal escape. Alternatively, force a stalemate or draw. Along the way, develop your pieces efficiently, control key squares, and execute tactical combinations to gain material advantage.
Click a piece to select it, then click a valid square to move. Green dots show valid moves. Capture the enemy king to win. Each piece has unique movement rules.
Click on any of your pieces to select it. Valid moves will be highlighted with green dots. Click a highlighted square to move. Special moves like castling and en passant are supported.
Pawns move forward one square (two on first move), capture diagonally
Knights move in an L-shape: two squares in one direction, one perpendicular

Rooks move horizontally or vertically any number of squares

King moves one square in any direction
AI Opponent - Multiple difficulty levels

How do I checkmate?
Checkmate occurs when the king is under attack and cannot escape by moving, blocking, or capturing the attacking piece. This ends the game.
What is castling?

Castling is a special move where the king moves two squares toward a rook, and the rook moves to the square the king crossed. Requirements: neither piece has moved, no pieces between them, king not in or through check.
How can I improve at chess?
Study opening principles, solve tactical puzzles, analyze your games, and practice regularly. Focus on controlling the center, developing pieces, and king safety.
What's en passant?
En passant is a special pawn capture. If an enemy pawn advances two squares and lands beside your pawn, you can capture it 'in passing' on your next move only, as if it moved just one square.
国际象棋
终极策略与战术游戏
国际象棋是世界上最著名的策略游戏，拥有超过1500年的悠久历史！在64格的战场上指挥16枚棋子——兵、马、象、车、后和王。每种棋子都有独特的移动规则，创造无限的战术组合和战略深度。无论你是学习基础的初学者还是精进残局技巧的高手，国际象棋都能提供无尽的智力挑战和满足感。
通过将军使对手的王无法逃脱来将死对方。或者逼和或和棋。在此过程中，高效发展棋子，控制关键格子，执行战术组合获得子力优势。
点击棋子选择它，然后点击有效位置移动。绿点显示有效移动。将死敌方国王即可获胜。每种棋子都有独特的移动规则。

如何将死？
当王被攻击且无法通过移动、阻挡或吃掉攻击棋子来逃脱时，就是将死。这结束游戏。
什么是王车易位？
王车易位是特殊走法，王向车移动两格，车移动到王越过的格子。要求：两个棋子都没移动过，中间没有其他棋子，王不在将军中也不经过将军格。
如何提高国际象棋水平？
学习开局原则，解战术题，分析你的对局，定期练习。专注于控制中心、发展棋子和王的安全。
什么是吃过路兵？
吃过路兵是特殊的兵吃法。如果敌方兵前进两格落在你的兵旁边，你可以在下一步（仅此一步）吃过路兵，就像它只前进了一格一样。

Checkers
The classic board game of kings! Jump over opponent pieces to capture them. Reach the opposite end to become a king. Simple rules, endless fun!

Checkers (also known as Draughts) is the classic two-player strategy board game that has been played for centuries! Two armies of twelve pieces each face off on an 8×8 board, moving diagonally and capturing opponents by jumping over them. When your piece reaches the opposite end of the board, it becomes a King with enhanced movement abilities. Simple to learn yet containing deep strategic elements, Checkers offers endless replayability!

Capture all of your opponent's pieces or block them so they cannot move. Advance your pieces across the board to reach the opposite end and become Kings. Use strategic positioning and forced capture rules to outmaneuver your opponent!
Click a piece to select, then click a valid square to move. Regular pieces move diagonally forward. Jump over opponent pieces to capture them. Kings can move backward.
Click on a piece to select it, then click on a highlighted valid square to move. Moves are diagonal on dark squares only. When a jump is available, you must take it.
Pieces move diagonally forward
Capture by jumping over opponent
Multiple jumps in one turn possible
Reach far end to become King
Kings move diagonally in any direction
Two-Player Mode - Play against a friend
AI Opponent - Challenge the computer
King Promotion - Enhanced piece abilities
Forced Captures - Strategic depth
Control the center of the board
Protect your back row to prevent opponent Kings
Look for double and triple jump opportunities
Advance pieces together rather than isolated
How do pieces become Kings?

When one of your regular pieces reaches the opposite end of the board (your opponent's back row), it is crowned and becomes a King. Kings are typically marked with a double piece or special indicator and can move diagonally in any direction.
Do I have to capture if I can?
Yes! In standard Checkers rules, if a capture is available, you must take it. This creates strategic opportunities to force your opponent into disadvantageous positions.
Can I make multiple jumps in one turn?
Yes! If after capturing a piece you're in position to capture another, you must continue jumping. This can lead to double, triple, or even longer capture sequences.
What's the best strategy for beginners?
Focus on controlling the center, keep your pieces protected by forming diagonal chains, and don't rush to make Kings at the expense of position. Patience and piece coordination win games!

Chimp Test
Can you beat a chimp at memory?

The Chimp Test is based on a famous scientific study that showed chimpanzees outperforming humans at certain memory tasks! Numbers flash briefly on screen in random positions, then disappear. Your task: recall and click the positions in numerical order (1, 2, 3...). Research shows chimps can handle sequences of 9+ numbers with remarkable accuracy. Can you match their memory power?

Remember the positions of numbered squares after they briefly appear, then click them in order from 1 to 9 (and beyond). Progress through increasingly difficult levels with more numbers to remember. Test your working memory against our primate cousins!
Numbers flash briefly on screen. After they disappear, click the squares in order from 1 to 9. Get them all right to advance to higher levels with more numbers.

Instant Feedback - Know immediately if correct
Use chunking - group numbers into patterns

Stay calm and focused during the flash

Why is it called the Chimp Test?
This test replicates a famous study where chimpanzees, particularly a chimp named Ayumu, could remember 9-number sequences with 90% accuracy, outperforming human adults!
What's a good score?
Most humans struggle beyond 7 numbers. Reaching level 9 is impressive. Young chimps in studies regularly achieve 80-90% accuracy at level 9.
How can I improve?
Practice regularly, use visualization techniques, and try chunking numbers into groups. Stay relaxed—stress hurts working memory performance.
Why are chimps better at this?
Scientists believe chimps have superior eidetic (photographic) memory for brief displays. Young chimps especially excel at this specific task, though humans can improve with practice.

你能在记忆上打败黑猩猩吗？
黑猩猩测试基于一项著名的科学研究，显示黑猩猩在某些记忆任务上胜过人类！数字在屏幕上随机位置短暂闪现，然后消失。你的任务：回忆并按数字顺序（1、2、3...）点击位置。研究表明黑猩猩可以以惊人的准确度处理9+个数字的序列。你能匹配它们的记忆力吗？
在数字短暂出现后记住编号方格的位置，然后按1到9（及更多）的顺序点击它们。在越来越困难的级别中进步，需要记住更多数字。测试你的工作记忆对抗我们的灵长类表亲！

将位置与空间记忆关联
在闪现时保持冷静专注
练习以提高你的工作记忆容量
为什么叫黑猩猩测试？
这个测试复制了一项著名研究，其中黑猩猩，特别是一只名叫Ayumu的黑猩猩，能以90%的准确率记住9个数字的序列，胜过成年人类！
什么是好的分数？
大多数人在7个数字以上就困难了。达到9级令人印象深刻。研究中的年轻黑猩猩在9级经常达到80-90%的准确率。
如何提高？
定期练习，使用可视化技巧，尝试将数字分成组。保持放松——压力会损害工作记忆表现。
为什么黑猩猩更擅长这个？
科学家认为黑猩猩对短暂显示有更优越的照相式记忆。年轻的黑猩猩尤其擅长这个特定任务，尽管人类可以通过练习提高。

Chinese Chess
Ancient Chinese strategy game Xiangqi

Chinese Chess (Xiangqi) is one of the world's oldest and most popular strategy board games, with over 2,000 years of history! Command your army across the River, using unique pieces with distinct movement patterns. The General stays protected in the palace while Chariots, Cannons, Horses, and Soldiers battle for position. Rich in tactical depth yet elegant in design, Xiangqi offers endless strategic challenges.

Checkmate the opponent's General (King) by placing it under attack with no legal escape. Control the battlefield, cross the River with your Soldiers, and use each piece's unique abilities to outmaneuver your opponent.
Click a piece to select it, then click a valid square to move. Pieces include General, Advisors, Elephants, Horses, Chariots, Cannons, and Soldiers.
Click on your piece to select it, valid moves will be highlighted. Click a highlighted square to move. Each piece type has unique movement rules.
General (将/帅): Moves one step orthogonally, confined to palace
Advisors (士): Move one step diagonally, confined to palace
Elephants (象): Move exactly 2 steps diagonally, cannot cross river, can be blocked
Horses (马): Move like chess knight but can be blocked by adjacent pieces
Chariots (车): Move any distance orthogonally (like chess rook)
Cannons (炮): Move like chariot, but capture by jumping over exactly one piece
Soldiers (兵/卒): Move one step forward, after crossing river can also move sideways
River Boundary - Soldiers gain abilities after crossing
Palace Restriction - Generals and Advisors stay within
Cannon Jump - Unique capture mechanic
Flying General - Generals cannot face each other directly
The General cannot leave the palace
Cannons need a screen piece to capture
Horses can be blocked by adjacent pieces
Control the river crossing points
What's the 'Flying General' rule?
Generals cannot face each other on the same file with no pieces between them. If your move would expose your General, that move is illegal.
Why can't my Horse move?
Horses can be 'hobbled'—if there's a piece adjacent to the Horse in the direction it wants to go, it cannot make that move.
How does the Cannon capture?
Cannons move like Chariots but must jump over exactly one piece (called the 'screen') to capture an enemy piece. They cannot capture without jumping.
What happens when Soldiers cross the river?
After crossing the river, Soldiers gain the ability to move sideways as well as forward, making them more versatile in attack.

中国象棋（象棋）是世界上最古老、最受欢迎的策略棋盘游戏之一，拥有超过2000年的历史！指挥你的军队跨越楚河汉界，使用具有独特移动模式的棋子。将/帅在九宫中受保护，车、炮、马和兵在战场争夺位置。战术深度丰富而设计优雅，象棋提供无尽的战略挑战。

Color Match
Test your color perception! Match colors quickly and accurately. A fun way to train your visual processing speed and color recognition.

Color Match is a brain-training game based on the famous Stroop Effect! A color word appears on screen, but the word itself may be displayed in a different color. Your task is to identify the COLOR of the text, not the word itself. This creates a cognitive conflict that tests your brain's ability to process conflicting information. Simple to understand, challenging to master—perfect for training cognitive flexibility!
Click the button that matches the COLOR of the displayed word, not the word itself. React quickly and accurately to score points. Train your brain to overcome the automatic impulse to read the word!
A word appears in a certain color. Click the button that matches the COLOR you see, not the word. For example, if "RED" appears in blue text, click BLUE.
Look at the displayed word and identify its color. Click or tap the corresponding color button from the options provided. Speed and accuracy both count toward your score.
Word and color may differ
Identify the color, not the word
Time bonus for fast responses
Wrong answers reduce score
Difficulty increases with speed
Stroop Test - Cognitive challenge
Speed Bonus - Faster = more points
Progressive Difficulty - Gets harder
Brain Training - Improve flexibility
Focus on the color, ignore the word
Trust your first instinct
Practice improves your cognitive flexibility
Stay calm when the word and color conflict
Why is this game difficult?

This is the famous Stroop Effect! Your brain automatically reads words faster than it processes colors. The conflict between what you read and what you see creates cognitive interference that you must overcome.
How can I improve at Color Match?

Practice regularly to train your brain to prioritize color processing over word reading. Focus visually on the letters' appearance rather than their meaning. With practice, you'll get faster at suppressing the automatic reading response.
What does this game test?

Color Match tests cognitive flexibility, selective attention, and processing speed. It measures how well your brain can filter out automatic responses (reading) to focus on the relevant task (color identification).
Is this used in psychology?
Yes! The Stroop Test is a widely used psychological assessment. It's used to measure attention, cognitive flexibility, and processing speed, and can even help detect certain cognitive conditions.

为什么这个游戏很难？
这是著名的斯特鲁普效应！你的大脑自动阅读单词比处理颜色更快。你读到的和你看到的之间的冲突创造了你必须克服的认知干扰。
如何在颜色匹配中进步？
定期练习训练你的大脑优先处理颜色而不是阅读单词。在视觉上专注于字母的外观而不是它们的含义。通过练习，你会更快地抑制自动阅读反应。
这个游戏测试什么？
颜色匹配测试认知灵活性、选择性注意和处理速度。它衡量你的大脑如何很好地过滤自动反应（阅读）以专注于相关任务（颜色识别）。
这在心理学中使用吗？
是的！斯特鲁普测试是广泛使用的心理评估。它用于测量注意力、认知灵活性和处理速度，甚至可以帮助检测某些认知状况。

Connect Four
Drop discs to connect four in a row! Strategic gameplay as you block your opponent while building your own winning line. A classic family favorite!

Connect Four is the classic two-player strategy game that has brought families together for generations! Drop colored discs into a vertical grid, watching them fall to the lowest available position. The goal is simple—be the first to connect four of your discs in a row, horizontally, vertically, or diagonally. But with each move, you must balance building your own winning line while blocking your opponent's threats!

Be the first player to connect four of your colored discs in a row—horizontally, vertically, or diagonally. Block your opponent's attempts while strategically positioning your own discs. Plan several moves ahead to create winning opportunities!
Click a column to drop your disc. Discs fall to the lowest available position. First player to connect four in a row wins. Block your opponent while building your own line!
Click on any column to drop your disc into that column. The disc will fall to the lowest empty position. Players alternate turns, with Red typically going first.
7 columns x 6 rows grid
Discs drop to lowest position
Four in a row wins (any direction)
Full column cannot be played
42 total possible moves maximum
Simple Rules - Easy to learn
Deep Strategy - Complex decision-making
Control the center column when possible
Look for "double threats" - two ways to win
Block opponent's potential connections early
Build from the bottom up strategically
What's the best first move?
The center column is the strongest opening because it provides the most winning possibilities. A disc in the center can be part of horizontal, vertical, and diagonal wins in both directions.
What is a double threat?
A double threat (or fork) is when you create two possible ways to win simultaneously. Your opponent can only block one, guaranteeing your victory on the next move.
Can Connect Four always be won?
With perfect play from both players, the first player (Red) can always force a win on a standard 7x6 board. However, achieving perfect play requires significant skill!
How do I recognize winning patterns?
Look for three in a row with open ends, or two pairs that could connect. Also watch for diagonal patterns—they're harder to spot than horizontal or vertical ones.
四子棋
投放圆盘连成四子！在阻止对手的同时建立自己的获胜连线。经典家庭游戏首选！
四子棋是几代人以来凝聚家庭的经典双人策略游戏！将彩色圆盘投入垂直网格，看着它们落到最低可用位置。目标很简单——成为第一个将四个圆盘连成一线的玩家，水平、垂直或对角线均可。但每一步，你必须平衡建立自己的获胜线，同时阻止对手的威胁！
成为第一个将四个彩色圆盘连成一线的玩家——水平、垂直或对角线。在策略性定位自己圆盘的同时阻止对手的尝试。提前计划几步来创造获胜机会！
点击一列放下圆盘。圆盘会落到最低的可用位置。首先连成四个的玩家获胜。在建立自己的连线时阻止对手！

最佳的第一步是什么？
中心列是最强的开局，因为它提供最多的获胜可能性。中心的圆盘可以是两个方向的水平、垂直和对角线胜利的一部分。
什么是双重威胁？
双重威胁（或叉子）是你同时创造两种获胜方式。你的对手只能阻止一个，保证你在下一步获胜。
四子棋总是能赢吗？
如果双方都完美发挥，先手（红方）在标准的7x6棋盘上总是能强迫获胜。然而，达到完美发挥需要相当大的技巧！
如何识别获胜模式？
寻找两端开放的三连，或可以连接的两对。也要注意对角线模式——它们比水平或垂直的更难发现。

Connections
Group 16 words into 4 categories

Connections is the hit puzzle game from The New York Times that challenges you to find hidden links between words! Given 16 seemingly random words, your task is to sort them into 4 groups of 4 based on common themes. But beware—some words might fit into multiple categories, and wrong guesses cost you lives! This daily brain teaser tests your knowledge of pop culture, wordplay, and lateral thinking.

Sort all 16 words into 4 correct categories of 4 words each. Identify the hidden connections—whether they're types of food, parts of phrases, or clever wordplay. Solve all groups before running out of mistakes!
Select 4 words you think belong together, then submit. If correct, the category is revealed. You have 4 mistakes allowed. Solve all 4 groups to win!

Be careful with tricky words that seem related
Yellow is easiest, purple is hardest
What do the colors mean?
Colors indicate difficulty: Yellow is most straightforward, Green and Blue are medium, and Purple requires creative thinking or obscure knowledge.
Can a word belong to multiple categories?
Words are often deliberately chosen to seem like they fit multiple groups. Only one arrangement is correct—think carefully before submitting!
What if I'm stuck?
Try shuffling the words for a fresh perspective. Look for words that only have one logical connection, then build from there.
What types of connections appear?
Categories include synonyms, things that share a characteristic, words that can precede/follow a common word, pop culture references, and clever wordplay.

Crossword
Classic crossword puzzle! Fill in the grid using the clues. Test your vocabulary and general knowledge. The ultimate word puzzle challenge!

Crossword puzzles are the quintessential word game that has challenged minds for over a century! A grid of white and black squares awaits your answers, with clues ranging from simple definitions to clever wordplay. Fill in words horizontally (Across) and vertically (Down), watching as intersecting letters help confirm your answers. Whether you're a casual solver or a cruciverbalist enthusiast, crosswords offer endless mental stimulation and vocabulary building!

Fill in all the white squares in the grid with correct letters to form words based on the given clues. Use intersecting letters from completed words to help solve others. Complete the entire puzzle correctly to win!
Click on a white square to select it. Type letters to fill in answers based on the clues. Press Tab or click clues to switch between Across and Down. All words must be correct to complete the puzzle!

Use crossing letters to narrow down possibilities
Plural clues usually mean plural answers
How do I start a crossword puzzle?
Scan through all the clues first and fill in any answers you know immediately. These crossing letters will help you solve adjacent words. Don't get stuck on one clue—move around the puzzle!
What if I don't know an answer?
Use crossing letters from other words to narrow down possibilities. Think about synonyms, wordplay, or common crossword fill patterns. If truly stuck, use a hint or move on to another section.
Are there different types of crosswords?

Yes! American-style crosswords have symmetric grids and straightforward clues. British/cryptic crosswords feature wordplay-based clues. Quick crosswords have simpler, more direct clues for faster solving.
How can I improve at crosswords?
Practice regularly, learn common crossword words and abbreviations, expand your vocabulary, and study different clue types. The more you solve, the more patterns you'll recognize!

如何开始填字游戏？
首先浏览所有提示，填写你立即知道的任何答案。这些交叉字母将帮助你解决相邻的单词。不要卡在一个提示上——在谜题中移动！
如果我不知道答案怎么办？
使用其他单词的交叉字母来缩小可能性。想想同义词、文字游戏或常见的填字游戏填充模式。如果真的卡住了，使用提示或转到另一个部分。
有不同类型的填字游戏吗？
是的！美式填字游戏有对称网格和直接的提示。英式/神秘填字游戏具有基于文字游戏的提示。快速填字游戏有更简单、更直接的提示，可以更快解决。
如何提高填字游戏技能？
定期练习，学习常见的填字游戏单词和缩写，扩展你的词汇量，并研究不同的提示类型。你解决的越多，你会识别的模式越多！

Crosswordle combines word puzzle creativity with strategic letter swapping! You're presented with a grid where each row should spell a valid word, but the letters are scrambled. Swap letters between columns to unscramble each row. With limited swaps and a ticking clock, this game tests both your vocabulary and spatial thinking. Can you unscramble all the words?
Swap letters between columns to make every row spell a valid word. Complete the puzzle using as few swaps as possible, or before time runs out. Challenge yourself to recognize word patterns quickly!

Can I swap letters in the same column?
No, swaps can only occur between different columns. This constraint is what makes the puzzle challenging—you must think about how each swap affects multiple rows.
What happens if I run out of swaps?
In limited swap mode, you'll need to restart. Try to plan your moves more carefully—look for swaps that fix multiple rows at once.
How do I know if a word is valid?
The game validates against a dictionary. If a row turns green, all words are valid. Invalid arrangements won't be accepted.
Start by identifying likely word patterns—common prefixes (TH, CH, WH) and suffixes (ING, TION, LY). Then focus on the most constrained rows first.

Dots and Boxes
Connect dots to form boxes! Complete a box to claim it and get another turn. The player with most boxes wins. A math-class classic goes digital!

Dots and Boxes is the beloved paper-and-pencil strategy game that has entertained students for generations! Players take turns drawing lines between dots, trying to complete boxes. When you complete a box, you claim it and get another turn. The player with the most boxes wins. Simple rules, but deep strategy involving chains, sacrifices, and careful endgame play!
Complete more boxes than your opponent by drawing the fourth side of each box. Claim boxes to score points and earn extra turns. The player who controls the chains in the endgame usually wins!
Click on lines between dots to draw them. When you complete a box, you score a point and get another turn. The player with most boxes wins.

Strategic Depth - Chain management
Classic Gameplay - Timeless fun
Avoid creating the third side of a box for your opponent
Try to create chains of boxes you can complete
The double-cross strategy: sacrifice 2 boxes to win the chain
Count boxes carefully in the endgame
What's the chain rule in Dots and Boxes?
A chain is a connected group of boxes where completing one forces you to give away others. The key strategy is deciding when to take a chain and when to force your opponent to open another chain.
What's the double-cross strategy?
When facing a long chain, take all but the last two boxes, then give those two to your opponent. This forces them to open the next chain, which you then capture. This sacrifice wins games!
Should I ever create the third side of a box?
Generally no—creating a box's third side lets your opponent complete it. However, in the endgame, you may need to strategically sacrifice boxes to control chain timing.
Is there a winning strategy?
Yes! On odd-sized grids, the first player can theoretically force a win with perfect play. The key is controlling the long chains and knowing when to sacrifice boxes for chain control.

点格棋中的链规则是什么？

什么是双十字策略？
面对长链时，拿取除最后两个以外的所有方格，然后将这两个给对手。这迫使他们打开下一条链，然后你捕获它。这种牺牲赢得比赛！

Fillomino
Divide the grid into regions! Fill each cell with a number equal to its region size. Same-sized regions cannot share an edge. A polyomino puzzle!

Fillomino is the creative region-dividing puzzle from Japan! Fill every cell with a number, where same numbers form connected regions (polyominoes). Each region's size must equal the number it contains. But here's the twist: different regions of the same number CANNOT share an edge. This creates fascinating logical challenges as you balance region sizes with placement constraints!

Fill the entire grid with numbers such that each number forms a connected region of exactly that size. Different regions with the same number cannot be orthogonally adjacent. Every cell must belong to exactly one region!
Click a cell and enter a number (1-9). Same numbers must form connected regions. Each region size must equal its number. Different regions with the same number cannot touch.

Click on a cell and type a number (1-9) to fill it. Connected cells with the same number form a region. Each region must contain exactly as many cells as its number indicates. Same-numbered different regions cannot share edges.
Same numbers = same region
Region size = the number itself

Region Division - Create polyominoes
Number Logic - Size equals value
Creative Solving - Multiple approaches

Small regions (1, 2) are easiest to place first
Watch for conflicts where same-numbered regions would touch
Count cells carefully - each region needs exactly its number of cells
Can two regions with the same number touch?

No! This is the key rule that makes Fillomino unique. Two separate regions with the same number cannot share an edge (orthogonal contact). Diagonal contact is fine. This constraint is crucial for solving.
How do I know where regions end?
Each region must contain exactly the number of cells shown by its number. A region of 5s must have exactly 5 cells. When a region reaches its size, all adjacent cells must have different numbers.
What's the best starting strategy?

Look for given numbers that constrain each other. Small regions (1s, 2s) are often forced. Also look for areas where large regions must extend—there's only one way to fit them without touching same-number regions.
Can I have unfilled cells?
No, every cell must be filled with a number and belong to exactly one region. The puzzle is complete only when the entire grid is properly divided into regions following all rules.

两个相同数字的区域可以接触吗？
不可以！这是使填满分独特的关键规则。两个具有相同数字的独立区域不能共享边缘（正交接触）。对角接触是可以的。这个约束对于解决至关重要。
我怎么知道区域在哪里结束？
每个区域必须恰好包含其数字显示的单元格数量。5的区域必须恰好有5个单元格。当区域达到其大小时，所有相邻单元格必须有不同数字。
最佳起始策略是什么？
寻找相互约束的给定数字。小区域（1、2）通常是强制的。还要寻找大区域必须扩展的区域——只有一种方法可以在不接触相同数字区域的情况下放置它们。
我可以有空单元格吗？
不可以，每个单元格必须填充数字并恰好属于一个区域。只有当整个网格按照所有规则正确划分为区域时，谜题才算完成。

Gomoku
Get five in a row to win

Gomoku (Five in a Row) is an ancient strategy board game that's simple to learn yet deeply strategic! Played on a 15×15 grid, two players compete to be the first to place five stones in a row—horizontally, vertically, or diagonally. While the rules are straightforward, the strategy is profound: block your opponent while building your own winning formations. This classic abstract strategy game has been played for centuries and continues to challenge minds around the world.

Be the first player to place five stones in an unbroken row (horizontal, vertical, or diagonal). Balance offense and defense—create your own winning threats while blocking your opponent's attempts to connect five.
Click on any intersection to place your stone. The first player to get five in a row (horizontal, vertical, or diagonal) wins. You play black against the AI.
Click on any empty intersection on the 15×15 board to place your stone. Players alternate turns, with black (you) moving first.
Black plays first, then players alternate turns
Place one stone per turn on any empty intersection
Win by connecting 5 stones in a row (any direction)
Lines can be horizontal, vertical, or diagonal
Game ends when someone achieves 5-in-a-row or board is full
15×15 Board - Standard Gomoku playing field
Visual Highlighting - Clear winning line display
Quick Games - Perfect for short breaks
Control the center for more winning opportunities in all directions
Create 'open fours' - four in a row with both ends open (unblockable)
Block opponent threats immediately, especially open threes
Build multiple threats simultaneously to overwhelm defense
What is an 'open four'?
An open four is four stones in a row with both ends empty. This is unblockable and guarantees victory on your next move.
Why is the center important?
The center gives you the most flexibility—you can build lines in all four directions. It also limits your opponent's options.
What should I watch for defensively?
Watch for opponent's 'open threes' (three in a row with both ends open). These will become open fours if not blocked immediately.
Can Gomoku end in a draw?
Yes, if the entire board fills up without either player achieving 5-in-a-row, the game is a draw. This is rare with skilled play.

Hangman
The timeless word guessing game! Guess letters one by one to reveal the hidden word before the hangman is complete. Test your vocabulary and deduction skills.

Hangman is the classic word game that has entertained and educated for generations! A hidden word is represented by blank spaces, and you must guess letters one at a time. Correct guesses reveal the letters' positions, while wrong guesses build the hangman figure. Guess the complete word before the drawing is finished! This simple yet engaging game tests vocabulary, spelling, and deductive reasoning.

Guess the hidden word by selecting letters before the hangman figure is completed. Use deduction and vocabulary knowledge to identify the word with as few wrong guesses as possible. Win by revealing all letters before running out of attempts!
Click letters on the keyboard or type to guess. Correct letters appear in the word. Wrong guesses add to the hangman. Win by guessing all letters before 6 mistakes.

Start with common vowels (E, A, O, I)

What letters should I guess first?
Start with E, A, R, I, O, T, N, S—the most common letters in English. This gives you the best chance of revealing letters early. Then look for common patterns like TH, ING, orTION.
How many wrong guesses do I get?
Traditionally, 6 wrong guesses complete the hangman (gallows, head, body, 2 arms, 2 legs). Some versions may vary, but 6 is the standard that balances challenge and fairness.
Can I guess the whole word?
In some versions, yes! Guessing the whole word is risky—if wrong, it may count as multiple wrong guesses. Only use this when you're confident and running low on guesses.
How can I improve at Hangman?

Build your vocabulary, learn common letter frequencies, and practice pattern recognition. Understanding word structure (common prefixes, suffixes, and letter combinations) helps you make educated guesses.
猜单词
永恒的猜词游戏！逐个猜字母揭示隐藏的单词，在小人完成之前猜出答案。考验您的词汇量和推理能力。
猜单词是几代人以来娱乐和教育的经典文字游戏！一个隐藏的单词由空白空间表示，你必须一次猜一个字母。正确的猜测揭示字母的位置，而错误的猜测构建绞刑架。在图画完成之前猜出完整的单词！这款简单而引人入胜的游戏测试词汇、拼写和推理能力。
在绞刑架完成之前通过选择字母来猜出隐藏的单词。使用推理和词汇知识，以尽可能少的错误猜测识别单词。在用尽尝试次数之前揭示所有字母来获胜！
点击键盘上的字母或输入来猜测。正确的字母会出现在单词中。错误的猜测会增加绞刑架。在6次错误之前猜出所有字母即可获胜。

单词分类 - 各种主题

从常用元音开始（E, A, O, I）

我应该首先猜什么字母？
从E, A, R, I, O, T, N, S开始——英语中最常见的字母。这给你早期揭示字母的最佳机会。然后寻找常见模式如TH, ING, 或TION。
我可以有多少次错误猜测？
传统上，6次错误猜测完成绞刑架（绞刑架、头、身体、2只手臂、2条腿）。一些版本可能有所不同，但6是平衡挑战和公平性的标准。
我可以猜整个单词吗？
在某些版本中，可以！猜整个单词是有风险的——如果错误，可能会算作多次错误猜测。只有在你有信心且猜测次数不足时才使用这个。
如何在猜单词中进步？
建立你的词汇量，学习常见的字母频率，并练习模式识别。理解单词结构（常见的前缀、后缀和字母组合）帮助你做出有根据的猜测。

Frogger is the beloved 1981 arcade classic that challenges you to guide a brave little frog home! Navigate through busy traffic, hop across treacherous rivers on logs and turtles, and reach the safety zones at the top of the screen. With its simple hop-and-dodge gameplay and increasingly challenging obstacles, Frogger has remained a favorite for over 40 years. Can you help all five frogs reach their lily pad homes?

Hidato
Connect numbers in a continuous path

Hidato (also known as Number Snake) is a logic puzzle that challenges you to fill a grid with consecutive numbers! Starting from 1, each number must connect to the next—horizontally, vertically, or diagonally. Some numbers are given, and you must deduce the rest. The result is a continuous path winding through the grid. Simple concept, satisfying solutions!

Fill the entire grid with consecutive numbers starting from 1, creating a continuous path where each number connects to the next. Use the given numbers as anchors to deduce the positions of all missing numbers.
Click empty cells to place the next consecutive number. Numbers must connect to their neighbors (horizontally, vertically, or diagonally). Right-click to remove a number.
Click on an empty cell to place numbers. You can only place the next consecutive number. Right-click or use Delete to remove a placed number.
Fill the grid with numbers from 1 to N
Each number must be adjacent to the previous and next (including diagonals)
Some numbers are pre-filled as clues
The path must be continuous—no gaps
Each number appears exactly once
Given Numbers - Anchor points to build from
Path Visualization - See the number chain
Error Highlighting - Invalid placements shown
Multiple Grid Sizes - Easy to expert levels
Start from 1 and work consecutively
Look for forced moves - cells with only one option
Diagonal connections count too
Use the revealed numbers as guides
Do diagonal connections count?
Yes! In Hidato, adjacent includes all 8 directions—horizontal, vertical, and diagonal. This creates more possible paths than grid puzzles that only use orthogonal movement.
How do I find where numbers go?
Start with the given numbers. For each gap between them, count how many steps apart they are. If two given numbers are 3 apart and 3 cells away from each other, the path between them is forced.
Look for 'bottlenecks'—cells that must be used because there's no alternative path. Also try working backwards from high numbers to find forced positions.
Is there always one solution?
Well-designed Hidato puzzles have exactly one solution. If you find multiple valid paths, the puzzle may not be properly constrained.

点击空格放置下一个连续数字。数字必须与相邻数字（水平、垂直或对角线）相连。右键单击删除数字。

Hitori
Shade cells so that no row or column contains duplicate numbers. All unshaded cells must connect. A simple concept with deep strategy!

Hitori is the elegant Japanese logic puzzle with deceptively simple rules! A grid filled with numbers awaits—but some must be eliminated. Black out cells so that no number repeats in any row or column. But there's more: black cells can never touch (orthogonally), and all white cells must form a single connected group. This creates clever chains of logical deduction!

Black out cells to eliminate duplicate numbers from each row and column. Black cells must never share an edge (diagonal is fine). All remaining white cells must connect into a single group. Find the unique solution through pure logic!
Click cells to black them out. Ensure: 1) No number repeats in any row/column, 2) Black cells never touch (diagonal is OK), 3) All white cells connect.

Click on a cell to toggle it between white and black. A cell can also be marked as 'definitely white' to help track deductions. The goal is to eliminate all duplicates while following the connection rules.
No duplicate numbers in any row/column
Black cells cannot touch orthogonally
All white cells must be connected
Each puzzle has one unique solution
Pure logic - no guessing needed
Simple Rules - Easy to understand
Deep Logic - Challenging deductions
Unique Solution - One right answer
Connection Puzzle - Spatial reasoning
If a number appears twice, one must be blacked out
If a number appears three times, the middle one stays white
Black cells can't touch - use this to mark neighbors white
Check that white cells stay connected
What's the key strategy for Hitori?

When you black out a cell, all its orthogonal neighbors must stay white (since black cells can't touch). This creates chains of deductions. Also, if blacking out a cell would disconnect white cells, it must stay white.
How do I handle triple occurrences?

If a number appears three times in a row, the middle one CANNOT be blacked out. Why? Because blacking out the middle would force both outer ones to stay white (no touching black cells), but then you'd have duplicates. So the middle must stay white, and one of the outer two must be black.
How do I check connectivity?
Before blacking out a cell, consider whether it would cut off any white cells from the main group. If blacking out a cell would create an 'island' of white cells, that cell must remain white.
Can I use trial and error?
Well-designed Hitori puzzles can be solved through pure logical deduction without guessing. If you're guessing, look harder for the logical constraints. Each move should be forced by the rules.

一人的关键策略是什么？
当你涂黑一个单元格时，它所有的正交邻居必须保持白色（因为黑色单元格不能接触）。这创造了推理链。此外，如果涂黑一个单元格会断开白色单元格，它必须保持白色。
如何处理三次出现？
如果一个数字在一行中出现三次，中间的不能被涂黑。为什么？因为涂黑中间会强迫两个外面的都保持白色（没有接触的黑色单元格），但那样你会有重复。所以中间必须保持白色，外面的两个中的一个必须是黑色。
如何检查连通性？
在涂黑一个单元格之前，考虑它是否会将任何白色单元格与主组切断。如果涂黑一个单元格会创建白色单元格的'岛屿'，那个单元格必须保持白色。
我可以使用试错吗？
设计良好的一人谜题可以通过纯粹的逻辑推理解决，无需猜测。如果你在猜测，更仔细地寻找逻辑约束。每一步都应该被规则强迫。

What's the story behind this puzzle?
Based on the Romance of Three Kingdoms, Cao Cao was trapped at Huarong Pass after losing the Battle of Red Cliffs. The puzzle recreates his escape attempt!

The classic starting position requires exactly 81 moves minimum. Finding this optimal solution is extremely challenging!

What happens when I match 4 or more jewels?

Matching 4 or more jewels creates special power-ups in many versions. Even without special powers, longer matches score significantly more points. Always look for opportunities to create larger matches!
Why should I work from the bottom?
Matching jewels at the bottom causes more jewels to fall, increasing the chance of creating automatic cascades and combos. Bottom matches can trigger chain reactions across the entire board!
What are cascading combos?
When matched jewels disappear and new ones fall, they may automatically create new matches. These cascade combos multiply your score without using extra moves—highly valuable for reaching targets!
How many moves do I get?
Most levels give you 30 moves to reach the target score. Use them wisely—sometimes it's better to set up a big combo than to take an immediate small match.

Classic jigsaw puzzle fun! Drag pieces to complete beautiful images. Multiple difficulty levels from easy 4x4 to challenging 10x10 grids.

Jigsaw Puzzle is the timeless brain teaser that has entertained families for generations! Scattered puzzle pieces await your assembly—each uniquely shaped piece must find its correct position to reveal the complete image. From simple 16-piece puzzles perfect for beginners to challenging 100-piece grids for experts, this classic game exercises spatial reasoning, pattern recognition, and patience. The satisfying click of pieces fitting together never gets old!

Arrange all scattered puzzle pieces into their correct positions to complete the image. Start with edges and corners, then work inward to fill in the details. Complete the puzzle as efficiently as possible for the best score!

What's the best strategy for starting a puzzle?
Begin by finding all corner pieces (4 corners) and edge pieces to create the frame. Then work on distinctive areas of the image—faces, text, or high-contrast sections are easier to identify.
How do I know if a piece is in the right place?
Correctly placed pieces typically lock or snap into position and cannot be moved again. The visual continuity of the image also confirms correct placement.
What makes some puzzles harder than others?
More pieces mean more complexity. Images with similar colors throughout (like sky or grass) are harder than images with distinct sections. Rotating pieces adds another layer of difficulty.
Does doing jigsaw puzzles improve brain function?

Yes! Jigsaw puzzles exercise both left brain (logic, sequential thinking) and right brain (creativity, intuition). Regular puzzling can improve spatial awareness, short-term memory, and problem-solving skills.

Kakurasu
Logic puzzle with row and column clues! Place cells in the grid so that row and column sums match the clues. A challenging number puzzle!

Kakurasu is the clever Japanese logic puzzle that combines simple addition with logical deduction! A grid of cells awaits your selection, with row and column numbers as clues. When you mark a cell, it contributes its column number to the row sum and its row number to the column sum. Use the target sums to determine which cells must be marked. Simple arithmetic, satisfying logic!

Mark cells in the grid so that each row's sum of column values and each column's sum of row values match the given clues. Every marked cell adds to two different sums—use this constraint to deduce the correct pattern!
Click cells to toggle them. The row clue shows the sum of column values for cells marked in that row. The column clue shows the sum of row values for cells marked in that column.
Click on any cell to mark or unmark it. Marked cells contribute their column number to the row sum and their row number to the column sum. The goal is to match all clue numbers.

How do the sums work?
In a 5×5 grid, columns are numbered 1-5 and rows are numbered 1-5. If you mark the cell at row 3, column 4, it adds 4 to row 3's sum and 3 to column 4's sum.
Look for rows or columns with clue 0 (no cells marked) or with maximum possible sums (all cells must be marked). These give you free information to start your deductions.
Can I use elimination logic?
Yes! If marking a cell would make a sum impossible, that cell must be unmarked. Similarly, if only one combination of cells can produce a sum, those cells are forced.
Is Kakurasu always solvable without guessing?
Well-designed Kakurasu puzzles have unique solutions solvable through pure logic. Each constraint should lead naturally to the next deduction without trial and error.
带有行列线索的逻辑谜题！在网格中放置格子，使行列总和与线索匹配。极具挑战性的数字谜题！

在网格中标记单元格，使每行的列值之和和每列的行值之和与给定的线索匹配。每个标记的单元格添加到两个不同的和——使用这个约束来推断正确的模式！

在5×5网格中，列编号1-5，行编号1-5。如果你标记第3行第4列的单元格，它会将4添加到第3行的和，将3添加到第4列的和。

设计良好的Kakurasu谜题有独特的解决方案，可以通过纯粹逻辑解决。每个约束应该自然地导致下一个推理，无需试错。

Kakuro
A crossword-style math puzzle! Fill empty cells with digits 1-9 so that the sum matches the clue. No digit can repeat in a single sum. Think Sudoku meets math!

Kakuro is the addictive mathematical puzzle that combines crossword-style grids with arithmetic challenges! Fill empty cells with digits 1-9 so that each horizontal and vertical 'word' adds up to the clue number. The catch? No digit can repeat within a single sum. This elegant constraint creates puzzles that exercise both your math skills and logical deduction abilities!
Fill all empty cells with digits 1-9 so that each horizontal and vertical entry sums to its clue number. No digit can repeat within any single entry. Use logic and math to deduce the unique solution!
Fill empty cells with digits 1-9. The numbers above/left indicate the sum of consecutive cells. Each digit can only appear once in each sum.

What are the unique combinations I should know?
Some sums have only one combination: 3 in 2 cells = {1,2}, 4 in 2 cells = {1,3}, 17 in 2 cells = {8,9}, etc. Memorizing these 'forced' combinations speeds up solving significantly.
How is this different from Sudoku?
Sudoku uses the same digits 1-9, but relies on row/column/box uniqueness. Kakuro uses sum constraints instead. Both require logical deduction, but Kakuro adds arithmetic reasoning.
Look for entries with limited combinations—small sums in few cells or large sums in many cells. These constrain possibilities and help you fill cells that then constrain other entries.
Can a digit repeat in intersecting words?
Yes! A cell might contain '5' which appears in both a horizontal and vertical word. The no-repeat rule only applies within a single horizontal or vertical entry, not across different entries.

KenKen
Math meets logic! Fill the grid so that each row and column contains unique digits. Numbered cages must equal the target using the specified operation.

KenKen (also called Calcudoku) is the arithmetic puzzle that combines Sudoku's uniqueness rules with mathematical operations! Fill a grid with digits 1-N so that no digit repeats in any row or column. The twist? Grouped cells (cages) must produce a target number when the specified operation (+, -, ×, ÷) is applied. This creates elegant puzzles that exercise both logical deduction and mental math!

Fill the grid with digits 1-N (where N is the grid size) so that each row and column contains each digit exactly once. Each cage must equal its target number when the operation is applied to its cells. Pure logic with a mathematical twist!
Fill each cell with digits 1-N (N = grid size). Numbers cannot repeat in rows or columns. Each "cage" must equal the target number using the specified operation.
Click on a cell, then type a number or use the number pad. Each row and column must contain each number exactly once. Cages with operations must equal their target when the operation is applied.

Use Sudoku logic for rows and columns
Division and subtraction can be in any order
For addition and multiplication, combine all numbers in the cage. For subtraction, subtract the smaller numbers from the largest. For division, divide the largest by the smallest.
Is KenKen the same as Calcudoku?
Yes! KenKen and Calcudoku are essentially the same puzzle type. KenKen is a trademarked name created by Japanese math teacher Tetsuya Miyamoto, while Calcudoku is the generic term.

Killer Sudoku
Sudoku with cage sum constraints

Killer Sudoku combines the logic of Sudoku with the arithmetic challenge of Kakuro! Fill the grid following standard Sudoku rules, but also ensure that numbers in each outlined 'cage' add up to the target sum shown in the corner. No digit can repeat within a cage, adding an extra layer of constraint. This ultimate Sudoku variant demands both logical deduction and mental math skills!

Fill the 9×9 grid so each row, column, and 3×3 box contains digits 1-9 exactly once, while also ensuring each cage's numbers sum to its target. Master both Sudoku logic and arithmetic combinations to solve these challenging puzzles!

How is this different from regular Sudoku?
Killer Sudoku adds cage constraints—groups of cells that must sum to a specific total. No digit can repeat within a cage, even if cells are in different rows/columns/boxes.
Look for small cages with limited combinations. A '3' cage with 2 cells can only be {1,2}. A '17' cage with 2 cells can only be {8,9}. Start with the most constrained areas.
Can I use normal Sudoku techniques?
Absolutely! All standard Sudoku techniques apply. In fact, you'll need to combine row/column/box elimination with cage constraints to solve these puzzles.
What if a cage spans multiple boxes?
The cage sum constraint still applies across all boxes. However, you still can't repeat digits within the cage, and standard Sudoku rules apply to each box individually.
